card.name: Stalking Soulmate
card.text: Your maximum hand size is two. It's also your minimum hand size. (Draw cards up to that number at end of turn if you have fewer.)

card.name: Occult Fascination
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create an X/1 red Elemental creature token with haste, where X is that spell's mana value. Sacrifice that token at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Fateful Excavation
card.text: (After your draw step, you may fulfill a ritual. Transform when all are fulfilled.) When Fateful Excavation enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, mill a card. Exile four land cards from your graveyard. Exile four nonland cards from your graveyard. --- (Back): Stirring Titan

card.name: Stirring Titan
card.text: Trample, ward {3} When this permanent transforms into Stirring Titan, all other nonland permanents phase out until Stirring Titan leaves the battlefield. (Treat phased-out permanents and anything attached to them as though they don't exist.) --- (Front): Fateful Excavation

card.name: Dreamwild Intrusion
card.text: Enchant land When Dreamwild Intrusion enters, mill three cards. You may discard a card. If you do, return a permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one color."

card.name: Unleash Potential
card.text: Unleash Potential deals X damage to any target. Recreate {X}{R}{R} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its recreate cost reduced by the power of a creature you sacrifice as you cast it this way. Then exile this.)

card.name: Clairvoyance Tank
card.text: {1}, {T}: When you next cast a spell this turn, draw a card. Then discard a card unless the amount of mana spent to cast that spell was less than its mana value.

card.name: Through Eerie Woods
card.text: (After your draw step, you may fulfill a ritual. Transform when all are fulfilled.) Hexproof Through Eerie Woods enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. Pay {2}{G}{G}. --- (Back): Name-Shorn Clearing

card.name: Name-Shorn Clearing
card.text: Permanents you control have ward {1}. Whenever a permanent you control becomes the target of a spell, you may draw a card. --- (Front): Through Eerie Woods

card.name: On Empty Streets
card.text: (After your draw step, you may fulfill a ritual. Transform when all are fulfilled.) Hexproof On Empty Streets enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. Pay {3}{W}{W}. --- (Back): Desolate Reflection

card.name: Desolate Reflection
card.text: When this permanent transforms into Desolate Reflection, return any number of creatures you control to their owners' hands. Whenever a nontoken creature you control leaves the battlefield, create a token that's a copy of that creature, then sacrifice it. --- (Front): On Empty Streets

card.name: Up Cryptic Spires
card.text: (After your draw step, you may fulfill a ritual. Transform when all are fulfilled.) Hexproof Up Cryptic Spires enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. Pay {2}{R}{R}. --- (Back): Long Climb to Heaven

card.name: Long Climb to Heaven
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put an eternity counter on Long Climb to Heaven, then exile the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of eternity counters on it. You may play one of those cards this turn. --- (Front): Up Cryptic Spires

card.name: Down Twisted Corridors
card.text: (After your draw step, you may fulfill a ritual. Transform when all are fulfilled.) Hexproof Down Twisted Corridors enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. Pay {1}{B}{B}. --- (Back): Ever-Worm's Gullet

card.name: Ever-Worm's Gullet
card.text: When this permanent transforms into Ever-Worm's Gullet and at the beginning of your upkeep, mill a card, then return a card at random from your graveyard to your hand. You lose life equal to its mana value. --- (Front): Down Twisted Corridors

card.name: Blessing of Harmony
card.text: Until end of turn, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain vigilance and "Prevent all damage that would be dealt to this creature." Recreate {4}{W} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its recreate cost reduced by the power of a creature you sacrifice as you cast it this way. Then exile this.)

card.name: Past Distant Thresholds
card.text: (After your draw step, you may fulfill a ritual. Transform when all are fulfilled.) Hexproof Past Distant Thresholds enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. Pay {1}{U}{U}. --- (Back): Astral Bridge

card.name: Astral Bridge
card.text: When this permanent transforms into Astral Bridge and whenever you cast a spell, you may tap or untap target permanent. --- (Front): Past Distant Thresholds

card.name: Laboratory Maniac
card.text: If you would draw a card while your library has no cards in it, you win the game instead.

card.name: Trustworthy Colleague
card.text: Creatures able to block another attacking creature not named Trustworthy Colleague can't block Trustworthy Colleague.

card.name: Purebred Offering
card.text: Lifelink When Purebred Offering dies, look at the top seven cards of your library. You may put a nonland permanent card with mana value less than or equal to Purebred Offering's power from among them onto the battlefield. Then shuffle.

card.name: Gaze of the Abyss
card.text: When Gaze of the Abyss enters or dies, you may have target creature's base toughness become equal to Gaze of the Abyss's toughness until end of turn.

card.name: Liminal Crag
card.text: Liminal Crag enters tapped. {T}: Add {R}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Liminal Crag: Draw a card.

card.name: Liminal Creek
card.text: Liminal Creek enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Liminal Creek: Draw a card.

card.name: Liminal Grove
card.text: Liminal Grove enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Liminal Grove: Draw a card.

card.name: Liminal Bog
card.text: Liminal Bog enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Liminal Bog: Draw a card.

card.name: Liminal Prairie
card.text: Liminal Prairie enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Liminal Prairie: Draw a card.

card.name: Inexplicable Entity
card.text: Hexproof from nonsorcery You may assign the combat damage of creatures blocking Inexplicable Entity divided as you choose among creatures you control.

card.name: Destructive Impulse
card.text: Choose one— • Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. It fights target creature you don't control. • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Discordant Collective
card.text: Trample Discordant Collective's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control. Whenever another creature you control enters, if that creature has greater power or toughness than Discordant Collective, draw a card.

card.name: Insect NOT
card.text: Flying

card.name: Reflection NOT
card.text: Haste

card.name: Heart of the Noosphere NOT
card.text: Hexproof {T}: Add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.

card.name: Crisis of Faith NOT
card.text: {2}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Surveil 1. You gain 1 life.

card.name: Elemental NOT
card.text: Haste

card.name: Unmarked Helicopter
card.text: Flash Flying, vigilance Whenever Unmarked Helicopter or another nonland permanent you control enters during combat, you may have Unmarked Helicopter become an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Dysmorphosis Carrier
card.text: Whenever a non-aberrant creature you control becomes aberrant, you may sacrifice it. When you do, that creature deals damage to any target equal to its power or its toughness, whichever is greater. (A creature is aberrant if its power and toughness aren't equal.)

card.name: Mundophobia
card.text: Enchant player At the beginning of enchanted player's end step, that player loses 1 life for each untapped permanent they control.

card.name: Looming Presence
card.text: As long as Looming Presence is untapped or attacking, everything you don't control that's a spell, ability, or permanent treats it as though it didn't exist. (Even when it enters.)

card.name: Oppressive Dreamwarden
card.text: Flash Flying Triggered abilities don't trigger.

card.name: Doomed Journalist
card.text: When Doomed Journalist deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it. If you do, draw two cards.

card.name: The Oneironaut's Handbook
card.text: Non-Spirit creatures you control have "You may choose not to untap this creature during your untap step" and "{2}, {T}: Create a token that's a copy of this creature, except it's a Spirit in addition to its other types, can't block, and has flying and haste. Exile that token when this creature leaves the battlefield or becomes untapped. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Ecstatic Zeal
card.text: Whenever a creature you control attacks or blocks, it gets +X/+Y until end of turn, where X is the difference between its power and its base power and Y is the difference between its toughness and its base toughness.

card.name: Incantations of the Nomon
card.text: Whenever you do one of the following that hasn't been noted for Incantations, note it and draw a card. Then if you've noted all five, exile Incantations. You may cast a spell from your hand without paying its mana cost. • Pay life. • Discard a card. • Sacrifice a permanent. • Exile a card from your graveyard. • Remove a counter from a permanent you control.

card.name: Shadow of Perdition
card.text: Pay 1 life: Put a +1/-1 counter on Shadow of Perdition.

card.name: Everburning Fugitive
card.text: Everburning Fugitive can't have toughness less than 1. Whenever a creature you control with a counter on it dies, it deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Pansomnolence
card.text: Each other noncreature, non-Aura permanent you control is a 3/2 Nightmare creature with haste in addition to its other types. Sacrifice Pansomnolence: Untap all permanents you control.

card.name: Impending Ruin
card.text: Whenever a creature you control with toughness greater than its power enters, until end of turn, that creature gains trample and haste and assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Spectral Guidance
card.text: Draw two cards. If this spell was cast from your hand, discard a card. Recreate {4}{U} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its recreate cost reduced by the power of a creature you sacrifice as you cast it this way. Then exile this.)

card.name: Exclusion Zone
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, create a token that's a copy of that creature, except it's an Ooze Shapeshifter in addition to its other types. Those creatures fight each other.

card.name: Utopian Vision
card.text: Each player may shuffle their hand into their library, then each player who does draws seven cards. Untap up to X lands, where X is twice the number of cards shuffled into your library this way. Exile Utopian Vision.

card.name: Cadis Yeln, IPC Chair
card.text: Flash When Cadis Yeln enters, exile up to one target spell or tapped nonland permanent. Its controller draws a card. At the beginning of your end step, if a card was put into exile this turn, you may exile another target permanent you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Mabil, Dreamscape Delver
card.text: [+1]: Mill two cards, then return a land card or a non-Mabil multicolored card from your graveyard to your hand. [-1]: Pay any amount of mana. Draw a card for each color of mana spent this way. [-6]: Create Heart of the Noosphere, a colorless legendary enchantment land token with hexproof and "{T}: Add {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}."

card.name: Satu Klair, Hexkeeper
card.text: Flash When Satu Klair enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls. [+2]: Draw two cards, then exile a card from your hand or a nonland permanent you control. [-X]: Until your next turn, you may cast nonland cards exiled with Satu Klair that have mana value X or less without paying their mana costs. Until your next turn, you may cast up to one card exiled with Satu Klair, Hexkeeper that has converted mana cost X or less without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Vand, the Breaking Dream
card.text: [+1]: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn. [-1]: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. [-3]: Put two loyalty counters on target creature. It becomes a copy of Vand until it has no loyalty counters on it, except it isn't legendary.
